basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Academic Support Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode has released the official notification for Academic Support Executive posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Kerala. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per the Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduation with 2 years of experience OR Graduation with 3 years of experience
qualification.details: Academic Support Executive: Post-graduation from a recognized university/institution with a minimum of two years of relevant experience in administrative and academic support areas. Graduation from a recognized university/institution with a minimum of three years of relevant experience in administrative and academic support areas. Skills: Strong communication skills in English and MS Office proficiency. Desirable knowledge in Statistics, Analytical Tools (SPSS/R/Python/Stata/Advanced Excel) and LMS/Moodle. Drafting skills.

salary_details.details: The salary for the Academic Support Executive post is Rs. 26,300/- per month. This includes Rs. 2000 as financial support for accommodation and Rs. 300/- as Telephone Allowance.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Academic Support Executive Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
